summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOGITAG Dashboard redesigned card layout with 5-column grid and detail modal. All requested features are working correctly: login flow, KPI cards display, 5-column card grid (Cartes mode), card design with header/REF/Détails button/icon area/famille/chips/footer, detail modal with STATUT pills and form fields, toggle Tableau/Cartes, search functionality, and modal close buttons.

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

passed_tests: Login flow with admin/user@1234 credentials - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
Dashboard displays 4 KPI cards: Engins tagués (28/5937), Tags utilisés (29/53), Engins sur site (1/5937), Tags à maintenir (1/53)
Clicking KPI card opens detail view with 5-column card grid (Cartes mode active by default)
5-column grid confirmed at 1920px desktop width (grid-template-columns: 285.797px x 5)
Card design: header with REF (e.g., BC5729028651) + 'Détails →' button
Card design: icon area for tags with colored icon
Card design: famille in colored text (e.g., 'BLE' in rgb(62, 179, 247))
Card design: chips showing status (Disponible) and active state (Actif)
Card design: footer with location info
Tag modal: title 'Détails du tag', X close button, STATUT section with Actif/Inactif pills, 5 form fields (ID TAG, LABEL, FAMILLE, STATUS, ADRESSE), Fermer button
Engin modal: title 'Détails de l'engin', photo area, STATUT section with Réception/Sortie/Non actif pills, form fields in 2 columns, battery bar, 'Voir sur la carte' button, Fermer button
Toggle Tableau/Cartes works - Tableau shows DataTable, Cartes shows card grid
Cartes mode is active by default (blue highlight)
Search bar filters cards (24 → 20 results when searching 'BLE')
Back arrow button closes detail view

data-testid attributes properly implemented: dashboard-detail, detail-search-input, result-count, card-grid, tag-card-*, engin-card-*, tag-details-btn-*, details-btn-*, modal-title, modal-close-x, modal-close-btn, modal-map-btn, toggle-table-btn, toggle-cards-btn, view-toggle, detail-close-btn
critical_code_review_comments: Card footer location text may be empty for some tags (shows 'Aucun site' or empty) - this is expected behavior based on data availability
context_for_next_testing_agent: NEW redesigned card layout with 5-column grid + detail modal fully tested and working. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented. External API is slow (10-15 seconds for data load). Login credentials: admin/user@1234. KPI cards: Engins tagués, Tags utilisés, Engins sur site, Tags à maintenir. Card design follows car-rental style with header (REF + Détails button), icon/photo area, famille in colored text, chips (status, active), footer with location. Detail modal has STATUT section with pills, form fields in 2 columns, and action buttons. Toggle between Tableau (table) and Cartes (cards) views works correctly. Search filters cards and updates count.

5_column_card_grid.responsive: Grid adapts columns based on viewport (5→4→3→2→1)

card_design.icon_area: Tags show icon, Engins show photo
